column1: Charlie: Meh - this server isn't ready, yet.
seanachain: I think the clock only appears when the first move is played.
C[Charlie: I'm not really happy about that top-left corner... sigh... so out of practice.
Anatole: the game is still long :)
C[Charlie: By capturing, I think you actually gave me back the move I lost.
C[Anatole: yes, it was not clever at all
C[Shambolic: Hello my friend, enjoy the game!
C[Charlie: Great time for a server update!
C[Shambolic: Looks like we're back! Fingers crossed...
C[Shambolic: I think I may be doooooooooooooooooooooomed!
C[Charlie: Indeed. Too many cutting points for me.
C[Charlie: Phew. Back to four liberties.
Shambolic: I often play games like this - you had a weak group at H14, but I didn't exploit it correctly
Shambolic: The AI always tells me that I'm well ahead and then screw up :-/
Charlie: I thought you could kill h14, yes.
Shambolic: M16 is nothing by the way
Charlie: Not if black plays it!
Shambolic: Good one to look at
Shambolic: If you take, white m19, and it's alive
Charlie: Because I can play K18 atari while you play M19
Shambolic: Anyway, well played, that was a fun game :-)
C[Shambolic: Charlie, you are too energetic for me
Shambolic: Good luck in your future endeavours
Charlie: I think you were ahead.
Charlie: Although the AI says I was leading. Odd.
